provider_source.source_of_truth_boundary: AOF export summarizes local runtime evidence, not raw provider transcript truth.

event_summaries.summary: Runtime heartbeat required next release completion using AOF runtime.
v9.4 was selected as the next provider-backed controlled execution candidate release.
AOF runtime commands inspected roadmap, release state, and audit gaps.
v9.4 controlled execution candidate artifacts and docs were generated.
Candidate audit, capability audit, product value audit, release-state audit, and tests are release evidence.
Production execution remains blocked; v9.4 only creates an operator go/no-go candidate.
Stop if production execution is authorized or upstream provider refs are missing.

risk_candidates: Controlled candidate could be read as production execution if wording is weak.
decision_candidates: Keep v9.4 as preproduction go/no-go candidate and defer live execution.

redaction_boundary: No secrets, credentials, provider payload bodies, or billing data are exported.
release_ready_boundary: Release readiness is bounded to structural/runtime candidate evidence and tests.
not_proven: Session export does not prove production execution safety, provider output correctness, or market adoption.
